Union SG have also lost their last two European home matches without scoring and have never gone three consecutive games without scoring at home in a major European competition. After 10 league rounds, Union Saint-Gilloise top the Belgian Pro League with 26 points, thanks to eight wins and two draws, boasting both the best attack (22 goals scored) and the best defense (6 goals conceded) in the tournament. The Belgians are likely to play in a 3-4-2-1 formation with Scherpen in goal, Mac Allister, Burgess and Leysen in defense, Khalaili, Zorgane, Van de Perre and Niang in midfield, and El Hadj and David providing support for Rodriguez in attack. evidences.title: Availability Report: Atlanta United to deal with injuries, suspension ...
evidences.content: Tristan Muyumba won't be in the midfield Saturday after suffering an adductor injury against Union. He was forced off the pitch after 34 minutes, the second time he was unable to continue this season. Luckily, the 5-Stripes have plenty of defensive midfield depth without Muyumba, including Bartosz Slisz, Mateusz Klich, Jay Fortune and Will Reilly.
